LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.0.description: I somewhat like the music being played, albeit the signal is terrible.
LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.0.label: ambient music
LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.1.description: I like the music being played, it's quite calming.
LanguageData.Thought_EffectRadio.stages.1.label: ambient music
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingThought.stages.0.description: Nothing better to relax than fishing
LanguageData.VCEF_FishingThought.stages.0.label: relaxing fishing session
LanguageData.VEE_Aurora.stages.0.label: beautiful aurora
LanguageData.VEE_Hail.stages.0.label: hit by hailstones
LanguageData.VFE_ArchotechSculptureImprint.stages.0.d: The archotech sculpture makes me constantly see a beautiful artwork. It makes me relaxed.
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.stages.0.description: The air feels fresh and smells nice!
LanguageData.VFES_FreshAir.stages.0.label: clean air
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.0.description: I feel energized, I'm on fire, witness me!
LanguageData.Chemshined.stages.0.label: chemshined
